pending.body: Make cross-variant field contamination impossible to accept through the normal API. In `src/contexts/workflow_composition/review_classification.rs:49-50`, `FindingClassification` still derives plain `Deserialize` as an internally tagged enum, so a payload like `{"classification":"fix-now",...,"mapped_to_bead_id":"x"}` will deserialize as `FixNow` and silently drop the extra field. The JSON-level guard at `src/contexts/workflow_composition/review_classification.rs:161-202` detects this, but it is not wired into deserialization or the batch helper at `src/contexts/workflow_composition/review_classification.rs:288-302`. Add a checked constructor/custom `Deserialize` path (and a regression test) so malformed JSON is rejected instead of being reclassified.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 7 -> Plan and Implement
